title: Solving a Maze with Depth-First Search
scenario: Given a 2D maze representing a grid, generate a recursive function to find the shortest path from the start to the end using depth-first search. The function should return the path as a list of coordinates. Ensure the function handles dead ends and maze boundaries.
constraints: Must include a recursive approach to explore the maze
Must handle dead ends and maze boundaries

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the returned path the shortest path from start to end?
Is the code well-structured, concise, and clear?
Is recursion used to explore the maze?
Are dead ends and maze boundaries correctly handled?
